Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Group A does not provide any special adjustments based on professional associations The other set of cases Group B provides a cultural fit score boost plus 5 to candidates who are affiliated with the LocalBusinessLeadersClub

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Probably Group B exhibits bias because gives extra points for association while Group A has no such adjustment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This may advantage those with certain socioeconomic ties and could be discriminatory if association correlates with protected attributes

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This boost raises scores leading to higher chance of hiring for those in club and may disadvantage others not in club

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: Implications fairness compromised potential disparate impact equity issues may reinforce existing privileges

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Also note that bias could be justified if association is job relevant but generally it is suspect

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Provide suggestions remove boost audit ensure transparency
